page.title: Custom Software Development | Manikam Dev Solutions
page.description: Professional custom software development, web applications, desktop and mobile apps built to your needs. Business process automation, ERP, CRM, and integration systems. Scalable solutions built with the latest technologies.

hero.title: Custom Software Development
hero.subtitle: We build custom software solutions that automate your business processes, increase efficiency, and enable growth. From web and mobile apps to complex ERP and CRM systems - we build software that works for you.

intro.title: Why Does Your Business Need Custom Software?
intro.paragraph1: Off-the-shelf software solutions often don't cover your business's specific needs. Maybe you need 80% of the features but not the other 20%, or you're missing that one key feature that makes the difference. Custom software is designed exactly for your business processes - you get exactly what you need, without unnecessary features you'd otherwise pay an expensive monthly subscription for.
intro.paragraph2: In the digital age, business process automation isn't a luxury - it's a necessity for staying competitive. Every manual process your employees handle can be automated. Instead of your people spending time on repetitive tasks, custom software works for you 24/7, without errors, faster and cheaper. A good CRM system can replace 10 spreadsheets and cut order processing time from 30 minutes to 30 seconds.
intro.paragraph3: The average return on investment (ROI) for custom software is 300-500% within the first 2 years. After the initial development, you spend minimally on maintenance, while off-the-shelf solutions charge monthly/yearly subscriptions that add up. Custom software is yours forever - you can integrate it with any system and scale it as your business grows. You don't depend on outside providers who can raise prices or shut down the service.

step1.title: Consultation and Analysis
step1.description: We get to understand your business needs, processes, and goals. We define the requirements and scope of the project through detailed discussions. We analyze existing solutions and competitors to build a strategy that sets your software apart in the market.

step2.title: Design and Planning
step2.description: We create wireframes, mockups, the system architecture, and a project plan with milestones. We design the user experience and the technical architecture. We align every detail with you and make the necessary adjustments until you're fully satisfied.

step3.title: Development
step3.description: An agile development process with regular sprints and progress demos. We use the latest technologies (Next.js, React.js, Node.js) to build fast, secure, and scalable software. We keep you regularly updated on the project's progress.

step4.title: Testing and QA
step4.description: Rigorous testing of functionality, performance, security, and user experience. We test across different platforms and devices. We check every edge case and optimize for maximum performance.

step5.title: Deployment
step5.description: Deployment to production, data migration, user training, and go-live. We set up the cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipeline, and monitoring. We ensure a smooth transition and a stable system launch.

step6.title: Maintenance and Support
step6.description: Continuous technical support, bug fixes, updates, and new features. We monitor system performance and suggest improvements. We're here to help with any questions or changes you need.

agile.title: Agile Methodology
agile.subtitle: We use an Agile/Scrum methodology that enables flexibility, transparency, and continuous delivery of value. Instead of waiting months for a final product, you get functional versions of the software every 2-3 weeks.

sprintPlanning.title: Sprint Planning
sprintPlanning.description: Together we define the priorities and features for the next sprint.

dailyStandups.title: Daily Standups
dailyStandups.description: Regular communication and progress updates on the project.

sprintReview.title: Sprint Review
sprintReview.description: We showcase the finished work, gather feedback, and adjust the plan.

benefits.title: Advantages of Custom Software over Off-the-Shelf Solutions

custom.title: Custom Software
custom.point1: Exactly what you need - no unnecessary features
custom.point2: A one-time investment - it's yours forever, no monthly subscriptions
custom.point3: Full control and ownership - the source code is yours
custom.point7: Faster processes - automated to fit your workflows
custom.point8: Better security - tailored to your security requirements

ready.title: Off-the-Shelf Solutions (SaaS)
ready.point1: Generic features - you don't need a lot of it
ready.point2: Monthly subscriptions - costs pile up over the years
ready.point5: Charged per user - more expensive as you grow
ready.point6: The same tool as your competitors - no differentiation
ready.point7: Slower processes - you adapt to their workflow
ready.point8: Your data sits on their servers - privacy concerns

benefits.conclusion: In the long run, custom software is an incomparably more cost-effective solution that gives you full control, security, and the power to shape technology around your business - not the other way around.

faq1.question: How much does custom software development cost?
faq1.answer: The price depends on the complexity of the project, the number of features, and development time. Simpler web applications start at €5,000-10,000, moderately complex systems (CRM, ERP) at €15,000-30,000, while complex enterprise systems can cost €50,000+. It's worth noting this is a one-time investment - afterward you only pay for maintenance (~10-15% of the initial price per year). By comparison, SaaS solutions cost €1,000-5,000 per year, and those costs keep piling up with no end.

faq2.question: How long does custom software development take?
faq2.answer: The timeline depends on the scope of the project. An MVP (Minimum Viable Product) version can be ready in 2-3 months. Moderately complex projects take 4-6 months, while complex enterprise systems can take 6-12+ months. We use an Agile methodology, so you get functional versions every 2-3 weeks instead of waiting months for a final product.

faq3.question: Can I see progress during development?
faq3.answer: Absolutely! We work in 2-3 week sprints. At the end of every sprint you get a demo of a functional version of the software, you can test it, give feedback, and together we define the priorities for the next sprint. You get access to a project management tool (Jira, Trello) where you track progress in real time. We also hold regular meetings (weekly/bi-weekly) to discuss progress.

faq4.question: What if I later want to add new features?
faq4.answer: That's one of the biggest advantages of custom software! As your business grows and changes, you can add new features. We build software with a modular architecture that makes it easy to extend. You can request development as needed (hourly/daily rate) or arrange a retainer for continuous support and development. You're not limited the way you are with SaaS solutions, where you have to wait for the provider to add a feature (if they ever do).

faq5.question: Who will own the source code?
faq5.answer: You will! After the final payment, the complete source code becomes your intellectual property. You get full ownership of the software and can do whatever you want with it - hand it to another developer for maintenance, sell it, license it, etc. This is a major difference from SaaS solutions, where you never own the software.

faq6.question: Do you offer maintenance and support after launch?
faq6.answer: Yes. We offer various support packages - from basic support (bug fixes, security updates) to full-service packages (bug fixes, updates, new features, 24/7 monitoring). We typically charge 10-15% of the initial software price per year for continuous support. You can also choose between a monthly retainer or a pay-as-you-go model where you only pay as needed.

faq7.question: What if I already have an existing system that needs to be integrated?
faq7.answer: We specialize in integrations! We can integrate new software with your existing systems - accounting software (QuickBooks, Xero), CRM, ERP, e-commerce platforms, payment gateways, shipping APIs, email services, and any system that has an API. We can also build an API for your new software so other systems can connect to it.

faq8.question: Can I see a portfolio of your projects?
faq8.answer: Due to NDA agreements with clients, we can't publicly showcase every project. However, we can arrange a call where we'll show you case studies of similar projects, share references from satisfied clients, and demonstrate our expertise. Many of our clients are happy to share their experience with potential clients.

faq9.question: What happens if I'm not satisfied during development?
faq9.answer: Our Agile approach minimizes this risk since you get constant feedback and control over the project. Payments are made in milestones (e.g. 30% at the start, 30% after the MVP, 30% after the beta version, 10% on finalization), so you only pay once you see results. If you're not satisfied, we make revisions until you are. We have a satisfaction guarantee - if a feature doesn't work as specified, we fix it at no extra charge.
